metadata.source: WorldCupHub schedule, cross-checked against FIFA format and schedule pages
metadata.timeFormat: Kickoffs are stored in Eastern Time (America/New_York, -04:00 during June/July 2026).
metadata.notes: Knockout placeholders follow the official bracket labels: 1A/2B/3ACDF and W/L match numbers.
metadata.teamNames: Spanish country names. Badge paths point to files under public/images when available.
